manual_entries.title: ASHRAE AHU Zone Group Operating Mode Guidance
manual_entries.summary: Zones served by a single AHU should be organized into zone groups that share schedules and enter the same zone-group operating mode together.

structured_payload.guidance: For zones served by a single AHU, define zone groups as shared scheduling units. If any zone in a zone group enters a non-unoccupied zone-group operating mode, all zones in that group should enter the same mode so the upstream air-handling system operates against a coherent load and schedule.

doc.file_name: HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Zone Groups are sets of zones served by a single air handler that operate together. If one zone in a Zone Group enters a mode other than Unoccupied Mode, all zones in that Zone Group enter that same mode.
chunk.text_excerpt: zone groups served by a single air handler operate together and enter the same mode

evidence.evidence_text: Zone Groups are defined as sets of zones served by a single air handler that operate together for scheduling and stable upstream operation, and if one zone in a Zone Group enters a mode other than Unoccupied Mode, all zones in that Zone Group enter that same mode.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

manual_entries.title: AHU Airflow Inspection and Calibration Procedure
manual_entries.summary: To restore inconsistent airflow, inspect the distribution system, maintain AHU moving components, and calibrate the unit to deliver the intended airflow rate.

steps: Inspect the system for ductwork leaks, blockages, or improper sizing that degrade airflow.
Repair or modify the affected ductwork promptly to restore proper airflow.
Inspect AHU fan blades, belts, and motors regularly and clean or replace them as needed.
Calibrate the AHU to confirm that it is delivering the intended airflow rate.

doc.file_name: HVAC系统效率和维护最佳实践.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Inspect ductwork for leaks, blockages, or improper sizing. Inspect, maintain, and calibrate the AHU to ensure that it delivers the correct airflow rates.
chunk.text_excerpt: inspect ductwork and calibrate the ahu to deliver the correct airflow rates

evidence.evidence_text: To address inconsistent airflow, inspect for ductwork issues, repair them promptly, and regularly inspect, maintain, and calibrate the AHU so it delivers the correct airflow rates.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统效率和维护最佳实践.pdf

manual_entries.title: AHU Preventive Airflow Maintenance Plan
manual_entries.summary: A proactive AHU maintenance plan should cover regular filter service, damper inspection and adjustment, and coil cleaning to preserve airflow and efficiency.

steps: Clean or replace filters on a regular schedule.
Inspect dampers and adjust them as needed.
Clean coils as part of the preventive maintenance cycle.
Use a proactive maintenance schedule to prevent airflow degradation and protect system efficiency.

doc.file_name: HVAC系统效率和维护最佳实践.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Implement a comprehensive maintenance plan that includes regular filter cleaning or replacement, damper inspection and adjustment, and coil cleaning.
chunk.text_excerpt: implement a preventive ahu maintenance plan for filters dampers and coils

evidence.evidence_text: A comprehensive maintenance plan should include regular filter cleaning or replacement, damper inspection and adjustment, and coil cleaning to prevent airflow problems and preserve efficiency.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统效率和维护最佳实践.pdf
